assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
Program.cs defines a client with AllowedGrantTypes set to Code (authorization code with PKCE)
The client configuration includes RedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
assertions.rationale: Both URIs are present in the client configuration

assertions.assertion: Program.cs has the correct middleware pipeline ordering: UseIdentityServer after UseRouting and before UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: Pipeline shows UseRouting, UseIdentityServer, UseAuthorization in correct order
